item.title: CV
item.description:
Aaditya Barak

AI Engineer — LLMs, RAG Systems, Document Intelligence

  • Phone: +91 9896127290
  • Email: aadityabarak970@gmail.com
  • LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/aaditya-barak
  • GitHub: github.com/AddyB0t

Technical Skills

  • Languages: Python, SQL, JavaScript
  • AI/ML: PyTorch, Transformers, NLP, Computer Vision, OCR
  • LLM & GenAI: LLMs, Prompt Engineering, RAG, LangChain
  • Databases: PostgreSQL, Supabase, Redis
  • Tools: Git, Linux

Experience

PrudentBit — Artificial Intelligence Engineer

May 2025 – December 2025 | Noida, Uttar Pradesh

  • Led development of a production-grade document redaction system for PDF, DOCX, images, reducing manual effort by 70% across 1,000+ documents
  • Built an end-to-end document AI pipeline (OCR + preprocessing + PII detection + masking), improving processing speed by 2x
  • Designed preprocessing pipeline improving OCR accuracy by 25–35%
  • Developed PII detection system with pixel-level masking while preserving layout
  • Implemented TinyBERT-based reranking (100ms) improving search relevance

Freelance AI Engineer — Self-Employed (Client Projects)

May 2025 – Present | Remote

item.title: What I learned while making my CV
item.description:
How to Create an Effective CV: A Comprehensive Guide

Creating a compelling CV (Curriculum Vitae) is essential for making a strong first impression on potential employers. A well-crafted CV can significantly increase your chances of landing interviews and ultimately securing your desired position. In this post, I’ll share insights and strategies I learned while creating my own CV.

Understanding the Purpose of a CV

Before diving into the creation process, it’s important to understand what a CV is meant to accomplish:
